name: Married to Medicine
overview: Follows a group of successful and educated women who are connected to the world of medicine in Atlanta, including doctors and wives of doctors. Whether delivering babies in Louboutins or rushing off to galas in Buckhead, these women do everything with style, drama, and of course, southern flair.

trailers.title: Married to Medicine: Season 5 Trailer - Premiering November 5 at 10/9c | Bravo
